next_focus: Production is technically available. Kubernetes/shared PostgreSQL database `marathon` is the operational source of truth; imported Marathon catalog, steps, participants, submissions, winners, payments, and NPS evidence are sufficient to continue product work. Continue read-only readiness/journey monitoring and avoid mutating smoke unless a specific launch-risk proof is needed.
follow_ups: Use a unique image tag or no-cache build when deploying uncommitted remote changes; reusing the git short SHA tag can leave Kubernetes on stale image content.
